---
title: "Maine vs Montana Health Infrastructure"
author:
date: "2026-03-11"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  word_document: default
---

Maine Data Sources:
  Critical Hospitals → 18
  
  https://www.ruralhealthinfo.org/states/maine 
  
  Hospitals → 32
  
  https://www.themha.org/hospitals.html 
  
  Long-Term Care → 78
  
  https://themainemonitor.org/healthcare-closure-maps/ 
  
  EMS → 269
  
  https://www.maineaap.org/assets/conferences/I-called-911-now-what_Maine-AAP-Conferencepdf.pdf 
  
  Public Health Depts → 9
  
  https://www.maine.gov/dhhs/mecdc/healthy-living/healthy-communities/public-health-districts
  
  
Montana Data Source:

Montana Health Care Coalitions. (2025). Western Montana Health Care Coalition Burn Mass Casualty Incident Surge Annex. 

https://www.mthcc.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/WMHCC-Burn-MCI-Surge-Annex-20250630-Final.pdf


```{r}
data <- data.frame(
  facility = c("Hospitals", "Critical Access Hospitals", "EMS", 
               "VA Nursing Home", "Urban Indian Clinics", 
               "LongTerm Care Facilities", 
               "Public Health Departments", "Tribal Health Department", 
               "Burn Centers"),
  count = c(5, 11, 49, 1, 3, 22, 12, 1, 0)
)

library(ggplot2)

ggplot(data, aes(x = facility, y = count, fill = facility == "Burn Centers")) +
  geom_col(fill = "seagreen") + 
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Healthcare Infrastructure in Western Montana", 
  subtitle = "Despite 60+ medical facilities, there are no burn centers 
  in the entirety of Montana",
  x = "", y = "Number of Facilities") + theme_minimal()

comparison_data <- data.frame(
  region = c(
    "Western Montana (WMHCC)", "Western Montana (WMHCC)",
    "Western Montana (WMHCC)", "Western Montana (WMHCC)",
    "Western Montana (WMHCC)", "Western Montana (WMHCC)",
    "Maine", "Maine",
    "Maine", "Maine",
    "Maine", "Maine"
  ),
  facility = c(
    "Hospitals", "Critical Access Hospitals", "EMS Units",
    "Long-Term Care", "Public Health Depts", "Burn Centers",
    "Hospitals", "Critical Access Hospitals", "EMS Units",
    "Long-Term Care", "Public Health Depts", "Burn Centers"
  ),
  count = c(
    5, 11, 49, 22, 12, 0,    # Western Montana (WMHCC)
    32, 18, 269, 78, 9, 1    # Maine Statewide
  )
)

ggplot(comparison_data, aes(x = facility, y = count, fill = region)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Western Montana (WMHCC)" = "seagreen",
    "Maine" = "maroon"
  )) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Healthcare Infrastructure: Western Montana vs. Maine",
    subtitle = "Maine has 1 burn center; Western Montana has 0 burn centers",
    x = "",
    y = "Number of Facilities",
    fill = "Region"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
```{r}

```
